where.if: AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.kakao_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_user u LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id

SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_user u LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mbm_point SET balance = balance + #{amount} ,bef_balance = balance ,last_history_id = IFNULL(#{lastHistoryId }, last_history_id ) ,last_history_date = CASE WHEN #{lastHistoryId} IS NULL THEN last_history_date ELSE NOW() END ,last_npay_id = IFNULL(#{lastNpayId }, last_npay_id ) ,last_npay_date = CASE WHEN #{lastNpayId} IS NULL THEN last_npay_date ELSE NOW() END ,last_cash_id = IFNULL(#{lastCashId }, last_cash_id ) ,last_cash_date = CASE WHEN #{lastCashId} IS NULL THEN last_cash_date ELSE NOW() END WHERE id = #{id}
